com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl

Class TEResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.impl.TEResponse
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITEResponse
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    IntegerTEResponse

    public class TEResponse
extends java.lang.Object
implements ITEResponse
    A generic response to a test environment request via the IExecutionHandler.teRequest(com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.ITERequest) callback. Use OK when possible instead of creating new objects.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static TEResponse CANCEL
      Creates an empty OK status, as shorthand for new TEResponse(StatusImpl.CANCELLED, null, null).
      static TEResponse OK
      Creates an empty OK status, as shorthand for new TEResponse(StatusImpl.OK, null, null).

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TEResponse(Status status, java.lang.String encoding, byte[] encodedResult)
      Create a TE Response with the given result and encoding.
      TEResponse(java.lang.String xmlEncodedResult)
      Create a TE Response with the given result encoded as as TCI XML values.
      TEResponse(java.lang.String encoding, byte[] encodedResult)
      Create a TE Response with the given result and encoding.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      byte[] getEncodedResult()
      Returns the encoded result in the format defined by encoding ITEResponse.getEncoding()
      java.lang.String getEncoding()
      Returns the encoding used for ITEResponse The encoding name used to call the codec in order to decode the encodedValue to a TCI value, use an empty string when encoding values as TCI XML values, defined by the namespace http://uri.etsi.org/ttcn-3/tci/Values_v4_4_1.xsd see TTCN-3 TCI Standard for details.
      Status getStatus()
      Returns the status of this response.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • OK

        public static final TEResponse OK
        Creates an empty OK status, as shorthand for new TEResponse(StatusImpl.OK, null, null).

      • CANCEL

        public static final TEResponse CANCEL
        Creates an empty OK status, as shorthand for new TEResponse(StatusImpl.CANCELLED, null, null).

    • Constructor Detail

      • TEResponse

        public TEResponse(Status status,
                  java.lang.String encoding,
                  byte[] encodedResult)
        Create a TE Response with the given result and encoding.
        Parameters:
        status - the response Status
        encoding - encoding name used to call the codec in order to decode the encodedValue to a TCI value, use an empty string when encoding values as TCI XML values, defined by the namespace http://uri.etsi.org/ttcn-3/tci/Values_v4_4_1.xsd see TTCN-3 TCI Standard for details.
        encodedResult - the encoded result

      • TEResponse

        public TEResponse(java.lang.String encoding,
                  byte[] encodedResult)
        Create a TE Response with the given result and encoding.
        Parameters:
        encoding - encoding name used to call the codec in order to decode the encodedValue to a TCI value, use an empty string when encoding values as TCI XML values, defined by the namespace http://uri.etsi.org/ttcn-3/tci/Values_v4_4_1.xsd see TTCN-3 TCI Standard for details.
        encodedResult - the encoded result

      • TEResponse

        public TEResponse(java.lang.String xmlEncodedResult)
        Create a TE Response with the given result encoded as as TCI XML values.
        Parameters:
        xmlEncodedResult - XML encoded result

    • Method Detail

      • getStatus

        public Status getStatus()
        Description copied from interface: ITEResponse
        Returns the status of this response.
        Specified by:
        getStatus in interface ITEResponse
        Returns:
        status

      • getEncoding

        public java.lang.String getEncoding()
        Description copied from interface: ITEResponse
        Returns the encoding used for ITEResponse The encoding name used to call the codec in order to decode the encodedValue to a TCI value, use an empty string when encoding values as TCI XML values, defined by the namespace http://uri.etsi.org/ttcn-3/tci/Values_v4_4_1.xsd see TTCN-3 TCI Standard for details.
        Specified by:
        getEncoding in interface ITEResponse
        Returns:
        encoding

      • getEncodedResult

        public byte[] getEncodedResult()
        Description copied from interface: ITEResponse
        Returns the encoded result in the format defined by encoding ITEResponse.getEncoding()
        Specified by:
        getEncodedResult in interface ITEResponse
        Returns:
        encodedResult
